summary: Tested NEURA mobile-first Expo app end-to-end. Backend: 8/9 pytest tests pass (fixed AI LlmChat API misuse — `with_max_tokens` → `with_params(max_tokens=...)`). 1 backend test fails: Stripe checkout returns 500 because the Pro and Family price IDs in /app/backend/.env do NOT exist in the live Stripe account. Frontend: login screen renders perfectly with NEURA branding, GalaxyCanvas, glass card, email/password inputs and Google button. Signup with Supabase email-confirmation ON works (info banner shown) but cannot auto-flow into onboarding. Bypassed via service-role admin user creation, then logged in → onboarding 3-step wizard (name → zones → tasks) → Galaxy screen showing stress badge, zone pills with counts, Claude-generated NEURA INSIGHT bar. All 5 bottom tabs (Galaxy/Tasks/AI/Forecast/Settings) render correctly. Add-task modal opens with full form. AI tab correctly shows Pro lock + disabled input. Forecast tab shows Pro upgrade overlay. Settings shows profile, FREE plan badge, Upgrade button, Privacy/Terms, Sign out. testID coverage is excellent across the entire app.

critical.issue: Returns 500 — Stripe error 'No such price: price_1TaVYpGsJ0sItovxU9tZtihW'. Both STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID and STRIPE_FAMILY_PRICE_ID in /app/backend/.env do not exist in the live Stripe account. User must paste the correct LIVE price IDs from their Stripe dashboard.

integration_issues.issue: Supabase project has email-confirmation ON, so /auth/signup returns success with session=null and the UI correctly shows the 'Account created. Please check your email…' info banner — but the user instruction expected immediate sign-in or onboarding redirect. User should either (a) disable 'Confirm email' in Supabase Auth settings for dev, or (b) the testing instructions should mention this is the expected flow. Verified the post-confirmation login path works perfectly via service-role admin-created user.

Supabase rejects emails like `neura.tester+xyz@example.com` with 'Email address is invalid' (HTTP 400). The suggested test account format in /app/memory/test_credentials.md needs updating to a plain email (e.g. `neuratest{rand}@gmail.com`). Not a code bug — Supabase project email validation setting.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated — replace with boxShadow for RN web parity (cosmetic only).
Console warning: props.pointerEvents is deprecated — migrate to style.pointerEvents (cosmetic only).

action_items: HIGH: Replace STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID and STRIPE_FAMILY_PRICE_ID in /app/backend/.env with the actual LIVE Stripe price IDs from the user's Stripe dashboard — current values are invalid. /api/billing/create-checkout-session and the Settings → Upgrade flow are broken until this is fixed.

MEDIUM: Ask the user to disable 'Confirm email' in Supabase Auth settings (Authentication → Providers → Email → Confirm email = OFF) for development/testing, OR update /app/memory/test_credentials.md to note that auto-confirmation is OFF and signup-test must use the service-role admin endpoint.

LOW: Update suggested test email format in /app/memory/test_credentials.md from `neura.tester+{random}@example.com` to `neuratest{random}@gmail.com` since Supabase rejects `+` aliases on this project.
LOW: Replace `shadow*` and `props.pointerEvents` deprecated APIs to silence RN-web console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py used `LlmChat(...).with_max_tokens(800)` in two places (lines 309 and 337). emergentintegrations LlmChat does not expose that method; correct usage is `.with_params(max_tokens=800)`. Fixed during this run — both /api/ai/chat and /api/ai/insight now return 200 with valid Claude replies.

Stripe price IDs are read at module import time (line 32-33) with `os.environ[...]` — if either is missing the backend will crash on startup. Acceptable for fail-fast config but mention in deployment docs.

/app/frontend/app/auth/login.tsx and signup.tsx OAuth uses `EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL` as the redirectTo for Google OAuth — this is the backend preview URL, which is fine in dev, but in production should be the deep-link scheme or the web app URL, not the API host.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_neura_backend.py (new pytest suite — 9 tests: health, config, AI insight/forecast/chat, billing checkout/portal)

success_rate.backend: 89% (8/9 pytest — only Stripe checkout fails due to invalid price IDs in env, not code)
success_rate.frontend: 100% of testable flows (login UI, onboarding 3-step wizard, Galaxy with stress badge + zone pills + Claude insight bar, all 5 tabs render, Add-task modal opens, AI Pro lock, Forecast Pro lock, Settings shows profile + plan + sign out). The auto-signup→onboarding flow blocked by Supabase email-confirmation setting, not a code bug.

seed_data_creation: Created confirmed Supabase test user via /auth/v1/admin/users (service-role). Credentials: email=neuratest4r31cbzp@gmail.com / password=Neura!Test2026. Onboarding completed, 1 Health task ('Plan morning routine') and 3 zones (Health, Work, Self) inserted into Supabase tables — verified that profiles, zones, tasks tables exist and accept inserts. Save these credentials for future regression runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test account already created and onboarded: neuratest4r31cbzp@gmail.com / Neura!Test2026 (Supabase user id b6fffcb5-de46-4560-9256-2dfea3b902c2). Use /app/backend/tests/test_neura_backend.py as regression suite. Stripe price IDs are STILL INVALID until main agent / user updates .env — until then expect the create-checkout-session test to fail. Supabase email-confirmation is ON, so new signups must either use service-role admin endpoint OR the user must disable Confirm email in Supabase Auth dashboard. AI endpoints (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent) take ~3-6s to respond — keep timeouts ≥30s. The /api/ai/chat endpoint was broken before this run; fix is committed.
rca_of_issue: AI endpoints (5xx): emergentintegrations LlmChat does not have a `.with_max_tokens()` method; correct method is `.with_params(max_tokens=...)`. Both /api/ai/chat and /api/ai/insight crashed with `AttributeError: 'LlmChat' object has no attribute 'with_max_tokens'`. Reproduce by calling POST /api/ai/chat with any payload before the fix. Mitigation applied in /app/backend/server.py lines 308-309 and 336-337. Backend auto-reloaded; both endpoints now return 200.  Stripe (5xx): /api/billing/create-checkout-session crashes with InvalidRequestError 'No such price' because STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID / STRIPE_FAMILY_PRICE_ID in /app/backend/.env refer to test-mode price IDs that don't exist in the live account. The Stripe secret key in .env IS live (sk_live_…). Either the price IDs must be regenerated in live mode and pasted in, or the secret key must be switched to test mode with matching test-mode price IDs.
